description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual attire suitable for an urban environment. He is wearing a knit beanie, a long-sleeve crewneck sweater, and straight-fit pants with a relaxed cut. His footwear consists of sturdy boots, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and he has a short beard. The overall appearance suggests a comfortable, everyday style appropriate for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian wearing a beanie, sweater, pants, and boots, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beanie, facial features, sweater, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the face, beanie, and the relaxed fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the beanie, sweater, and pants, with hands at the sides.
description_view_3: Back-left angled view showing the side of the face, back of the sweater, and the relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve sweater, straight-fit pants, knit beanie, and boots
